documents.content:
STM32F4xx Microcontroller Datasheet
1. PRODUCT OVERVIEW
            The STM32F405xx and STM32F407xx are based on the high-performance
            ARM Cortex-M4 32-bit RISC core operating at a frequency of up to 168 MHz.

1. PRODUCT OVERVIEW
            The STM32F405xx and STM32F407xx are based on the high-performance
            ARM Cortex-M4 32-bit RISC core operating at a frequency of up to 168 MHz.
2. FEATURES
            - Core: ARM Cortex-M4 with FPU, up to 168 MHz
            - Flash: Up to 1 MB
            - SRAM: Up to 192 KB
            - ADC: 12-bit, 16 channels, up to 2.4 MSPS
            - DAC: 12-bit, 2 channels
            - Timers: Up to 14 timers
            - Communication: USART, SPI, I2C, CAN, USB OTG
            - Operating Voltage: 1.8V to 3.6V
            - Operating Temperature: -40°C to 85°C

2. FEATURES
            - Core: ARM Cortex-M4 with FPU, up to 168 MHz
            - Flash: Up to 1 MB
            - SRAM: Up to 192 KB
            - ADC: 12-bit, 16 channels, up to 2.4 MSPS
            - DAC: 12-bit, 2 channels
            - Timers: Up to 14 timers
            - Communication: USART, SPI, I2C, CAN, USB OTG
            - Operating Voltage: 1.8V to 3.6V
            - Operating Temperature: -40°C to 85°C
3. PIN DEFINITIONS
            VDD: Power supply (1.8V-3.6V)
            VSS: Ground
            PA0-PA15: Port A pins
            PB0-PB15: Port B pins
            PC0-PC15: Port C pins
            VDDA: Analog supply
            VSSA: Analog ground
            BOOT0: Boot selection
            NRST: Reset pin (active low)

3. PIN DEFINITIONS
            VDD: Power supply (1.8V-3.6V)
            VSS: Ground
            PA0-PA15: Port A pins
            PB0-PB15: Port B pins
            PC0-PC15: Port C pins
            VDDA: Analog supply
            VSSA: Analog ground
            BOOT0: Boot selection
            NRST: Reset pin (active low)
4. ADC SPECIFICATIONS
            Resolution: 12-bit (0-4095)
            Sampling Rate: Up to 2.4 MSPS
            Input Channels: 16 external + 2 internal
            Reference Voltage: VREF+ (typically 3.3V)
            Conversion Time: 12 cycles for 12-bit

4. ADC SPECIFICATIONS
            Resolution: 12-bit (0-4095)
            Sampling Rate: Up to 2.4 MSPS
            Input Channels: 16 external + 2 internal
            Reference Voltage: VREF+ (typically 3.3V)
            Conversion Time: 12 cycles for 12-bit
5. GPIO SPECIFICATIONS
            Output Current: 25 mA per pin (max)
            Total Current: 120 mA per port (max)
            Input Voltage: -0.3V to VDD+0.3V
            Pull-up/Pull-down: 40 kΩ typical

5. GPIO SPECIFICATIONS
            Output Current: 25 mA per pin (max)
            Total Current: 120 mA per port (max)
            Input Voltage: -0.3V to VDD+0.3V
            Pull-up/Pull-down: 40 kΩ typical
6. I2C SPECIFICATIONS
            Speed: Standard (100 kHz), Fast (400 kHz)
            Address: 7-bit or 10-bit
            Noise Filter: Built-in 50ns filter
            Clock Stretching: Supported

6. I2C SPECIFICATIONS
            Speed: Standard (100 kHz), Fast (400 kHz)
            Address: 7-bit or 10-bit
            Noise Filter: Built-in 50ns filter
            Clock Stretching: Supported
7. UART SPECIFICATIONS
            Baud Rate: Up to 10.5 Mbps
            Data Bits: 8 or 9
            Stop Bits: 1 or 2
            Parity: None, Even, Odd
            Flow Control: RTS/CTS optional

7. UART SPECIFICATIONS
            Baud Rate: Up to 10.5 Mbps
            Data Bits: 8 or 9
            Stop Bits: 1 or 2
            Parity: None, Even, Odd
            Flow Control: RTS/CTS optional
8. POWER CONSUMPTION
            Run Mode: 100 mA @ 168 MHz
            Sleep Mode: 30 mA
            Stop Mode: 100 μA
            Standby Mode: 2 μA

8. POWER CONSUMPTION
            Run Mode: 100 mA @ 168 MHz
            Sleep Mode: 30 mA
            Stop Mode: 100 μA
            Standby Mode: 2 μA
9. MEMORY MAP
            0x08000000 - 0x08100000: Flash (1 MB)
            0x20000000 - 0x20030000: SRAM (192 KB)
            0x40020000 - 0x40020400: APB1 Peripherals
            0x40010000 - 0x40010400: APB2 Peripherals

9. MEMORY MAP
            0x08000000 - 0x08100000: Flash (1 MB)
            0x20000000 - 0x20030000: SRAM (192 KB)
            0x40020000 - 0x40020400: APB1 Peripherals
            0x40010000 - 0x40010400: APB2 Peripherals
10. CLOCK CONFIGURATION
            HSI: 16 MHz internal RC
            HSE: 4-26 MHz external crystal
            PLL: Up to 168 MHz output
